---
title: "Lady Susanna Blunt"
---

## Lady Susanna Blunt

**Dates:** (1829/30-8 April 1900)

**Maiden name:** (Nelson)

### Biography

She was daughter of the 2nd Earl Nelson, who changed his name from Bolton on succeeding his uncle in 1835,  and sister of the 3rd Earl Nelson. She was therefore related to Alexander Montgomery Moore.  At a fairly advanced age she married (27 June 1865) the Rev. Canon Alexander Colvin Blunt.  She was the president of the GFS in Winchester diocese in 1878.  Her mother and CMY’s had been friends.  [PB Blunt Bt. Nelson E]

### Letters

- Letter from April 14th 1900
- Letter from April 11 [1900]
- Letter from Oct 30th 1899
- [To Mary Yonge, Oct 18th [1897[[footnote:1]]]](../letters/3385_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from March 28th [1884] 
- Letter from Oct 5th [1865]
- Letter from October 1, 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
